desc_head:
Die New Yorker Konferenz des Schiller-Instituts am 26. Januar wurde von der Vorsitzenden des Instituts, Helga Zepp-LaRouche, mit der folgenden Rede eröffnet.

playlist_title: New York Conference • January 26, 2013 - “A New Paradigm to Save Mankind”
video_title: Helga Zepp LaRouche: Keynote Address to New York Conference • Jan. 26, 2013
desc_head:
Helga Zepp LaRouche reminds to audience what is at stake in the geo-political situation today as well as what the needed remedies are for recovery.  Nothing short of a New Paradigm led by classical artistic composition can bring the world out of it's current state of crisis.
--
Schiller Institute Conference • Riverside Church, New York City • January 26, 2013
